items.title: Stop “Ghost Commands” on Bad Wi-Fi: ros2_kinematic_guard for `/cmd_vel` safety
items.summary:
Hi ROS Community,

Have you ever tuned DDS QoS for hours, only to see a mobile robot execute a “ghost command” after a bad Wi-Fi / 5G spike?

I’ve been working on a small ROS 2 project called ros2_kinematic_guard to address what I call Wireless Command Collapse.

The issue is not just packet lo

items.title: RoboInfra is the missing infrastructure layer for robotics development
items.summary:
Robot models defined in URDF act as the “source code” of robotic systems, but the tooling around them is fragmented, slow, and dependent on full ROS installations.

RoboInfra solves this by providing a unified API platform that enables developers to:

  1. Validate URDF files instantly with 9+ structural checks
  2. Analyze robo

items.title: SEMEV-12: A Practical Ethical Layer for AI and Future Robots
items.summary:
Hello everyone,

I’m Marussa, a solo founder working on QERRA-v2.

I’ve created SEMEV-12, a 12-dimensional ethical evaluation framework that is designed to work as a real-time safety layer for AI systems and, in the future, autonomous robots. The 12 core dimensions (Coherence Protection, Family Severance, Survival Instinct, Moral Pre

items.title: rbot: an open-source AMR simulation stack for ROS 2 Jazzy and Gazebo Harmonic
items.summary:
Hi everyone,

We are releasing rbot, an open-source Autonomous Mobile Robot simulation stack built for ROS 2 Jazzy and Gazebo Harmonic.
